channel.title: CurlSwiggerLabs
channel.description: PortSwigger Web Security Academy labs solved with curl.

item.title: JWT Authentication Bypass via Weak Signing Key
item.description: How to exploit weak JWT signing keys by bruteforcing the secret to forge administrator tokens and bypass authentication.

item.title: Arbitrary Object Injection in PHP (Insecure Deserialization)
item.description: How to exploit PHP insecure deserialization to inject arbitrary objects and trigger magic methods for remote file deletion.

item.title: SSRF Filter Bypass via Open Redirection
item.description: How to bypass SSRF filters using an open redirection vulnerability, exploiting a chained attack to access internal admin interfaces.
